nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 馬島草鴞
nodes.summary: 馬島草鴞（Red owl，学名 Tyto soumagnei），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is known to live in humid evergreen forest and dry deciduous forest in the east of the island, being found in primary forest and in disturbed secondary forest (possibly even human altered open areas)

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is currently listed as vulnerable because of habitat loss, but recent studies have determined it may have a wider range than first believed, though further research in distribution and ecology is required

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The greatest threat to the red owl has been the increasing rate of deforestation and fragmentation of its forest habitat
